title: Crunchy Mochi Waffles with New Potato Wedges
description: A sweet and savory fusion of crispy Japanese-inspired mochi and golden new potato wedges, perfect for a satisfying snack.
instructions: Preheat waffle iron to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together mochi, bread crumbs, sugar, cinnamon, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together olive oil and egg.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until a thick batter forms.
Cook waffles according to waffle iron instructions.
Meanwhile, slice new potatoes into wedges.
Toss potato wedges with a little olive oil and season with salt.
Bake potato wedges in the oven at 400°F (200°C) for 12-15 minutes, or until crispy.
Serve waffles with baked potato wedges on top.
